title: Sweet Roti Bread Toast
description: A simple breakfast recipe that combines the flavors of sweet roti with crispy bread toast.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Cut the sweet roti into small pieces and toast them in the pan for 2-3 minutes.
Butter the bread slices and toast them in the pan for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown.
Assemble the toast by placing the sweet roti pieces on top of the bread.
Drizzle honey over the roti pieces.
